audit_items.proof_trace: When `withValidation=true`, the function computes `minTimestamp = block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold`, attempts a Data Feed fallback if Data Streams is stale, then sets `isStale = updatedAt < minTimestamp` and reverts with `StaleFeedData` if stale. All code paths — no Data Feed configured, Data Feed also stale, Data Feed fresher but stale, Data Feed older than Data Streams — correctly result in revert. All callers that pass `withValidation=true` (bid, performUpkeep, GPV2 order fill) exercise this enforcement path.
